description: 戦闘動作の追加セット: コンボ攻撃・射撃・詠唱・ガード・回避の5状態(hires, toon-3, 6ジョブ)。platformer-hero系プリセットと組み合わせて使う想定。

states.name: attack-combo
states.action: Multi-hit melee combo: two to three linked strikes through windup, hit, brief recovery, next windup, hit, and a final follow-through/recovery pose.
requirements: Show a visibly distinct strike beat at each hit frame rather than one repeated pose stretched across all 8 frames.
Any weapon trail or impact flash must be physically attached to or overlapping the character silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached slash arcs, floating impact stars, or motion lines outside the silhouette.
Keep apparent scale and baseline stable within the row.

states.name: shoot
states.action: Ranged attack cycle: raise/aim the ranged weapon, draw/charge, release, and brief recoil recovery.
requirements: Show the ranged weapon (bow, gun, sling, or similar) staying attached to the character's hands in every frame.
Any muzzle flash, bowstring flex, or release glow must be physically attached to the weapon/silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw a separate projectile, detached flash, motion lines, or smoke trail.
Keep the aim direction and baseline stable within the row.

states.name: cast
states.action: Spellcasting sequence: raise hands/focus item, channel, peak casting gesture, and release/recovery.
requirements: Any magical glow, rune, or energy effect must be physically attached to or overlapping the hands or focus item and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached floating orbs, particle bursts, sparkles, or trailing energy outside the silhouette.
Keep the character's footing and baseline stable; the casting motion should read through arms/hands and posture.

states.name: block
states.action: Held defensive guard stance: shield or arms raised to block, with a very small idle shift between the two frames.
requirements: Keep the guarding pose, facing direction, and prop (shield/weapon) essentially identical between the two frames aside from the subtle shift.
Do not draw impact flashes, sparks, or effects; this state has no incoming-hit moment, just the held guard.

states.name: dodge
states.action: Quick evasive dodge: low crouch/lean anticipation, sideways or backward evasive motion, and recovery back toward a neutral stance.
requirements: Show the evasion through pose and body lean/position only.
Do not draw speed lines, motion blur, dust, afterimages, or any detached motion effect.
Keep the character fully on-model with no cropped limbs during the evasive lean.
